subject: Fighter in orange and blue gi surrounded by crackling electric energy aura in a power-up stance
description: A fighter in an orange and blue martial arts gi crouches in a wide power-up stance with arms slightly raised. Intense crackling electric energy radiates outward from the figure in all directions, suggesting a massive power surge. The spiky black hair is visible against the blazing energy backdrop. The pose conveys restraint about to become explosive release.
foreground: Fighter in orange gi in wide stance with electric energy aura
background: Explosive electric energy effects radiating outward
emotion: intense concentration, raw power barely contained
